mnemonics: 5 C's: Check, Clean, Characterize, Calculate, Communicate
keyPoints: Understand your data's structure and quality before analysis
Use visualizations to identify patterns, trends, and outliers
Calculate summary statistics to quantify central tendency and dispersion
commonMistakes: Analyzing data without checking for missing values or errors first
Creating visualizations without proper labeling or context
Using inappropriate summary statistics for the data type (e.g., mean for skewed data)
